examples: This paper reported the results of Microbiological assay of actinomycin 23-21 using bacillus subtilis 63501 as testing organism.
Having treated roots with PEG and Actinomycin D or Cycloheximide, the accumulation of ABA in roots and leaves were inhibited clearly.
On March 7, Guidant announced that it was suspending its clinical trials of stents coated with actinomycin-D, because that drug has not proved efficacious in preventing restenosis.
